title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: So I wanted to spend my weekend with you. It's Friday night and I'm about to go to an Olivia Rodrigo concert. The weather is super rainy, which I'm not excited about, but I think the concert will be lots of fun. Usually I'd have a cocktail or a drink to pre-game the concert because I like having a little bit of a buzz at concerts, but I'm probably drinking tomorrow and Sunday, and I don't want to go on a huge bender. So tonight I'm going to the concert sober. I've been listening to her music all day and I can't wait to sing along to all of her songs, so let's head out to go to the concert. My hair was wavy in style earlier, but because of the rain and humidity, it fell flat. That's the problem with having pin straight hair, so annoying.

I'm back home in my PJs and ready to finally unwind and relax a bit. It's been such a crazy, busy weekend. I had so much fun though and made a ton of memories, but I am pretty worn out, and I feel like even though tomorrow's Monday, I need a recovery day. I don't want to go to work tomorrow. I just want to lay in bed and be lazy all day. Right now, I'm going to take off my makeup and chill before the week starts. I hope you all enjoyed this video. I had so much fun showing all of you what I got up to this weekend. There will be a lot more videos like this coming your way, so please stay tuned and check out the pins comment below. If you liked this video, please subscribe to our channel, comment below, and like the video. Thank you so much everybody, and I will see you next time. Good night!

I'm not super huge into fashion. I usually like to dress quite simply, so picking out an outfit was really frustrating, and I was just feeling a little bit self-conscious getting ready. But I think I did decide on my outfit, so I'm about ready to go. I just need to pack my things, and I am meeting my friends nearby at a shuttle bus stop. I also know some of the models walking in the show, so I can't wait to see some old friends and catch up with them.

We had fun, but now we are starving, so we're waiting for our shuttle bus to get us back to Seoul, so we can grab a bite to eat. I got level one, yeah. After the fashion show, my friends and I stuffed our faces.
